title: Minecraft, but its the trailer!
body:
This Modpack aims to get the humanly closest to the Minecraft trailers you can get.

# **FEATURES**
- Awesome Mob/Player Animations
- Immersive Sounds
- Extra Particles and Effects
# **Modloader**
This Modpack is exclusive to fabric for Performance Reasons.
# **Why Choose this?**
- You may think, Why get this over Low Res Trailer Recreation?
1. I found that it doesn't have player animations
2. It doesn't have many performance mods
3. It has some mods that lower performance, But aren't neccesary
